title: O Thank The Lord With Great Rejoicing

verses.text: O thank the Lord with great rejoicing, His deeds among the peoples voicing. Praise him, his wondrous works proclaim, And glory in his holy name. Let those who seek him praise the Lord, Their hearts exulting in his word. © 2009 Standing Committee for the Publication of the Book of Praise of the Canadian Reformed Churches

Turn to the Lord, who fails us never, And seek his face, his strength, forever. Recall the wonders he has wrought, The righteous judgements he has taught. Remember these, you chosen one, O Abr’am’s offspring, Jacob’s sones. © 2009 Standing Committee for the Publication of the Book of Praise of the Canadian Reformed Churches

He is the Lord, our God unfailing, His judgments ev’rywhere prevailing. He will remember and uphold His cov’nant made in days of old. The steadfast words of his command A thousand generations stand. © 2009 Standing Committee for the Publication of the Book of Praise of the Canadian Reformed Churches
